title: Storyboard · "Knock" — Radio→Animation production script · S24
body:
**Scene 24: 29:00–30:30 · Pastoral Closing Line**

HERO FRAME: Card: "Old Radio · New Eyes" with the narrowhighway.com URL beneath · the silhouette of an open door with warm light spilling out · understated · 1950s magazine illustration

MOTION: Soft fade to URL. 10 seconds.

MOOD: Family pastor. Not preachy. Just *true*.

---

AUDIO: *Narrator (M.R. Harris, soft, slow, marquee voice — keep in ElevenLabs):*

> *"Fredric Brown wrote 'Knock' as a joke about how short a story could be. The two-sentence version goes: 'The last man on Earth sat alone in a room. There was a knock at the door.' He thought he was writing about loneliness

source.label: Dimension X episode #05 (NBC Radio, May 6, 1950) adapting Fredric Brown's 1948 short-short story "Knock" (originally in *Thrilling Wonder Stories*, December 1948)

author: matt

witnesses.label: Rufinus of Aquileia, Commentary on the Apostles' Creed (c. AD 404)
Pirminius, De singulis libris canonicis scarapsus (c. AD 750) — earliest received form
Cited by every major catechism since 8th century
